history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead (row 02 column C) is lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to change my orientation. Turning clockwise will make me face down, which leads to a safe floor cell (row 03 column B). Turning counter-clockwise would face up into a wall (row 01 column B), which is not useful. So I will turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 col B facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 03 col B) is floor, so I can move forward safely. This will bring me closer to the goal at row 04 col D while avoiding the lava at row 02 col C and row 04 col C.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 col B facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 04 col B) is floor, but that leads to a dead end because the only adjacent cells are walls or lava. To reach the goal at row 04 col D, I should go right first to row 03 col C, then row 03 col D, then down to goal. So I need to turn to face right. From facing down, turning counter-clockwise will make me face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 col B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 03 col C is floor, so I can move forward safely. This will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 col C facing right. The next cell forward is row 03 col D, which is floor. Moving there will bring me closer to the goal at row 04 col D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 col D facing right. The goal is directly below at row 04 col D. I need to face down to move towards it. Turning clockwise will change my orientation from right to down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down at row 03 col D. The cell directly in front is row 04 col D, which is the goal cell. I will move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
